acceptance_criteria: - All baml crates use explicit dependency versions (no *.workspace in their Cargo.toml)\n- Internal baml crates marked publish=false and metadata aligned with DSRS\n- dspy-rs and dsrs-macros build against the new baml-bridge path and cargo check passes
description: Replace workspace dependency usage in baml crates with explicit versions, set publish=false and DSRS-style metadata, and update dspy-rs/dsrs-macros to point at new baml-bridge path with explicit deps.
title: Normalize baml manifests to explicit deps + internal-only

acceptance_criteria:
1. filter_truncate with ... suffix
2. filter_slice_chars (no suffix)
3. filter_format_count with thousands separators
4. Registered in prompt environment
5. Unit tests for edge cases (empty string, exact length, negative numbers)
6. cargo test passes
title: Add prompt-specific Jinja filters: truncate, slice_chars, format_count

acceptance_criteria:
1. RenderSession struct with all fields
2. Constructor with RenderSettings
3. with_ctx builder accepting impl Serialize
4. push_depth returns new session
5. check_recursion for cycle detection
6. Clone impl
7. cargo check passes
title: Implement RenderSession for per-render context
